pattern: A linear DP counts decodings where each position contributes single-digit and two-digit options, with the wildcard expanding into its allowed digit ranges, all taken modulo 1e9+7.
hints: Extend the classic decode-ways DP so a state counts the number of letter strings, not just groupings.
A single '*' stands for 9 letters; a two-character window's count depends on which digits or wildcards it contains.
Track ways ending at each index using contributions from one-char and two-char decodings, where '*' multiplies by the number of valid digits it can take in that context; keep everything mod 1e9+7.

stress.description: random short string of digits and wildcards (kept small for the brute-force oracle); avoids guaranteed-invalid lone zeros being too common
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, min(9, size)))
    chars = '123456789*'
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(chars) for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
